recipe.title: Greens mac 'n' cheese
recipe.description: This Jamie Oliver mac 'n' cheese recipe is SO good, and it's packed with gorgeous green veggies. Topped with flaked almonds for crunch and oozy Cheddar.

ingredients.name: ½ a bunch of fresh thyme

steps.descr: Trim, halve and wash the leek and peel the garlic, then...
steps.instructions: Trim, halve and wash the leek and peel the garlic, then finely slice with the broccoli stalks, reserving the florets for later.

on_enter.say: Trim, halve and wash the leek and peel the garlic, then finely slice with the broccoli stalks, reserving the florets for later.

steps.descr: Place the sliced veg in a large casserole pan over a...
steps.instructions: Place the sliced veg in a large casserole pan over a medium heat with the butter, then strip in the thyme leaves and cook for 15 minutes, or until softened, stirring regularly.

on_enter.say: Place the sliced veg in a large casserole pan over a medium heat with the butter, then strip in the thyme leaves and cook for 15 minutes, or until softened, stirring regularly.

steps.descr: Stir in the flour, followed slowly by the milk, then...
steps.instructions: Stir in the flour, followed slowly by the milk, then simmer for 10 minutes, or until thickened, stirring regularly.

on_enter.say: Stir in the flour, followed slowly by the milk, then simmer for 10 minutes, or until thickened, stirring regularly.

steps.descr: Meanwhile, cook the pasta in a large pan of boiling...
steps.instructions: Meanwhile, cook the pasta in a large pan of boiling salted water for 5 minutes, then drain.

on_enter.say: Meanwhile, cook the pasta in a large pan of boiling salted water for 5 minutes, then drain.

steps.descr: Grate the Parmesan and most of the Cheddar into the...
steps.instructions: Grate the Parmesan and most of the Cheddar into the sauce, and mix well. Tip into a blender, add the spinach and whiz until smooth – you may need to work in batches.

on_enter.say: Grate the Parmesan and most of the Cheddar into the sauce, and mix well. Tip into a blender, add the spinach and whiz until smooth – you may need to work in batches.

steps.descr: Season to perfection with sea salt and black pepper,...
steps.instructions: Season to perfection with sea salt and black pepper, then stir through the pasta and broccoli florets, loosening with a splash of milk, if needed.

on_enter.say: Season to perfection with sea salt and black pepper, then stir through the pasta and broccoli florets, loosening with a splash of milk, if needed.

steps.descr: Transfer to a 25cm x 35cm baking dish, grate over the...
steps.instructions: Transfer to a 25cm x 35cm baking dish, grate over the remaining Cheddar and scatter over the almonds. Bake for 30 minutes, or until beautifully golden and bubbling.

on_enter.say: Transfer to a 25cm x 35cm baking dish, grate over the remaining Cheddar and scatter over the almonds. Bake for 30 minutes, or until beautifully golden and bubbling.
